---
title: Week 03 -- `Tidyverse` Single-Table Queries 
subtitle: AAI1001 -- Data Engineering and Visualization 
author: Guang Hua
date: 2026-01-19
date-format: "dddd MMM DD, YYYY"

toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
engine: knitr
format:
  revealjs:
    self-contained: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    margin: 0.05
    min-scale: 0.2
    max-scale: 2.0
    scrollable: true
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: false
    incremental: true
    logo: imgs/sit_logo_mark.png
    footer:  AAI1001 -- AY25/26 Tri 2 (Assisted by GenAI)
    html-table-processing: none
    code-block-height: 700px
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(knitr)
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Orignal Data Visualization

<hr>

content

## Critiques and Proposed Improvements

<hr>

content

## Data Selection and Sources

<hr>

content

## Data Engineering Workflow (from raw data to visualization-ready data)

<hr>

content

## Improved Visualization (corresponding to proposed improvements)

<hr>

content

## Insights and Analysis

<hr>

content

## Conclusion

<hr>

content
